custom-mquo5937-1.name: 彩色火柴人
custom-mquo5937-1.visualDna: The overall style features a simplistic and cartoonish aesthetic with a pale background suggesting a desert environment. The line work is thin and expressive, while the color palette is minimal, primarily using soft tones of beige and muted colors. Shading is minimal, focusing on flat colors which contribute to a light-hearted and whimsical mood.
custom-mquo5937-1.characterDescription: The main character is a slender, stick-like figure with a round head and oversized, expressive eyes. They have a simplistic body shape, wearing a tattered piece of clothing that adds a primitive touch, and their open arms and uncertain expression suggest a sense of curiosity or confusion in the barren landscape.

custom-mqutc0si-1.name: 漫画2
custom-mqutc0si-1.visualDna: The image features a clean, minimalist background with a light color palette dominated by whites and pastels. The line style is thick and bold, enhancing the cartoonish aesthetic. Shading is simple and subtle, creating a flat appearance, contributing to an overall approachable and friendly mood.
custom-mqutc0si-1.characterDescription: The main character is a police officer with a simple, rounded body shape and minimal facial details. He stands confidently while interacting with a group of shopkeepers, who share similar simplistic designs and consistent torso shapes, indicating a communal environment.

custom-mqv42si2-1.name: 彩色漫画
custom-mqv42si2-1.visualDna: The visual style features a clean and modern aesthetic with a subtle gradient background suggesting a sunset. The line style is smooth and crisp, with a focus on dynamic facial and clothing details. The color palette leans towards warm tones with contrasting shadows, creating depth, and the shading technique employs soft gradients for a polished look. Overall, the mood is contemplative and somewhat introspective, evoking a moment of pause.
custom-mqv42si2-1.characterDescription: The main character has a lean body shape and appears to be in a relaxed posture, standing still in an elevator. His face is partially obscured, but he has soft features and casual attire, which enhances the relatable and everyday feel of his character. He relates to the environment through his relaxed stance and the intimate setting of the elevator, suggesting a moment of personal reflection.
